name: gdpr-compliance-ai
description: GDPR Compliance for AI Systems server. Classify data processing activities, determine lawful basis under Article 6, generate Data Protection Impact Assessments (Article 35), handle data subject rights requests (Articles 15-22), assess breach notification requirements (72-hour rule), and crosswalk GDPR requirements to EU AI Act obligations. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.description: Classify data processing activities per GDPR articles. Determines which

tools.name: lawful_basis_assessment
tools.description: Determine the appropriate lawful basis for processing under GDPR Article 6.

tools.description: Generate a Data Protection Impact Assessment per GDPR Article 35.

tools.description: Handle data subject rights requests under GDPR Articles 15-22.

tools.name: breach_notification
tools.description: Assess breach severity and notification requirements under GDPR Articles
